hero.title:
Building Bridges,
Strengthening Community
hero.subtitle: The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State promotes investment, trade cooperation, and community development throughout the Greater Seattle area.

about.title: About CCCWA
about.p1: The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) is a nonprofit corporation established pursuant to the Washington Nonprofit Corporation Act for mutual benefit.
about.p2: We promote and facilitate investment and trade cooperation between China and the United States, working with organizations across Washington State on matters of mutual interest.
about.v1_desc: Building connections across cultures and industries
about.v3_desc: Holding our members and programs to the highest standards

programs.title: Programs & Services
programs.subtitle: Connecting businesses and communities across Washington State
programs.trade_desc: Facilitating US-China cross-border investment opportunities, business matchmaking, and trade consulting services.
programs.network_desc: Regular networking events, business forums, and introductions connecting Chinese and American businesses.
programs.culture_desc: Promoting cultural understanding through events, exhibitions, and community programs celebrating Chinese heritage.
programs.legal_desc: Access to legal advice, immigration consulting, and regulatory guidance for businesses entering the US market.
programs.media_desc: Bilingual media outreach and communications services helping members reach Chinese and English-speaking audiences.
programs.health_desc: Support for Chinese-American residents including health resources, COVID-19 relief efforts, and community welfare programs.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.hero_sub: Join us for networking, forums, and cultural celebrations
events.e1_desc: Join us for our flagship annual dinner celebrating CCCWA members and recognizing outstanding contributions to the Washington business community.
events.e2_desc: A full-day forum featuring keynote speakers, panel discussions, and networking opportunities focused on bilateral trade opportunities.
events.e3_desc: A casual networking event for CCCWA members and prospective members. Light refreshments provided. RSVP required.

news.title: Latest Events
news.hero_sub: Stay up to date with the latest from CCCWA
news.n1_title: CCCWA COVID-19 Weekly Star — Immigration Asset Disposal
news.n1_excerpt: Attorney Cai discusses immigration asset management challenges for Chinese families settling in the US during the pandemic.
news.n2_title: CCCWA Foundation Unites Community Against COVID-19
news.n2_excerpt: CCCWA Foundation coordinated with local businesses and volunteers across Greater Seattle.
news.n3_excerpt: Hundreds of members gathered to celebrate the Spring Festival with performances and awards.
news.older_link: View Older Posts on Original Site

donate.title: Become a Member
donate.desc: Join CCCWA and gain access to an exclusive network of business leaders, trade resources, and community events.

mission.hero_sub: The purpose and objectives that guide everything we do
mission.p1: The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) is a nonprofit corporation established pursuant to the Washington Nonprofit Corporation Act for mutual benefit.
mission.obj1: To represent Chinese enterprises and entrepreneurs in the State of Washington;
mission.obj2: To provide forums in which Chinese businesses in the State of Washington can identify and discuss common interests regarding their commercial interests in the United States;
mission.obj3: To work with other organizations in the State of Washington on matters of mutual interest and to enhance bilateral communication and collaboration between Chinese and American business communities;
mission.obj4: To promote Chinese investment into and China-bound investment from the State of Washington and to develop and facilitate USA-China cross-border trade and commerce;
mission.obj5: To do all other lawful things as may be incidental or conducive to the attainment of the foregoing objectives.
mission.values_p: CCCWA is committed to integrity, inclusiveness, and excellence in serving its members and the broader community. We believe that strong business communities are built on trust, collaboration, and mutual respect across cultural boundaries.

leadership.hero_sub: 管理委员会 — The dedicated leaders of CCCWA
leadership.intro: Our board of directors and executive committee bring together experienced business leaders, legal professionals, and community advocates committed to advancing the mission of CCCWA.

directory.hero_sub: Our network of leading Chinese-American businesses across Washington State
directory.title: CCCWA Members
directory.subtitle: Connect with our member businesses and organizations
directory.join_cta_desc: Join CCCWA to have your business featured in our member directory and gain access to our network.

join.hero_sub: Become part of Washington State's premier Chinese business network
join.why_p1: Membership in the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State connects you with a growing network of entrepreneurs, investors, and business leaders bridging the US and China.
join.why_p2: As a member you receive access to exclusive events, bilingual business resources, legal and consulting referrals, and opportunities for cross-border trade partnerships.
join.tier1_desc: For registered businesses — full access to all CCCWA programs, events, and directory listing
join.tier2_desc: For entrepreneurs and professionals — networking access and event invitations
join.tier3_desc: For community supporters — newsletter, select events, and community updates
join.form_sub: Fill out the form below and our team will be in touch.
join.f_name_note: * Please include your name in your message below.

contact.hero_sub: We'd love to hear from you
contact.f_name_note: * Please include your name in your message below.
